moment_that_matters: Final settlement release under uncertain sanctions screening
stakes: $18,000,000 wire to a new beneficiary — irreversible once released.
ai_shift: AI screening and risk scoring can clear or block transactions at machine speed — small signal shifts can move millions in seconds.
Automation compresses the time window for dual control, escalation, and corroboration.
When a probabilistic model output becomes a deterministic release action, the liability moves from ‘model quality’ to ‘reliance authorisation’.

proposed_action.summary: An automated payments workflow proposed releasing an $18,000,000 wire transfer to a new beneficiary, relying on AI-driven sanctions screening and case disposition.

rationale: Sanctions screen confidence below autonomy threshold.
Dual control not satisfied for new beneficiary at this amount.

enforcement.action_taken: Hold settlement; trigger re‑screen; open case; route dual approval packet.
